task_description: The 'redis-cache' service experienced gradually increasing memory usage starting 6h before the outage at 23:41 UTC. A recent deployment introduced a memory leak in the cache layer component.

commits.author: heidi@company.com
commits.message: chore: update cache layer connection parameters
commits.diff:
--- a/redis-cache-service/cache_layer.go
+++ b/redis-cache-service/cache_layer.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 9
+config.Timeout = 1 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
